description_long: This house is a single-story residential building set within a fenced lot, featuring a combination of hip and gable roofs with reddish-brown tiles. The property includes a main structure with several attached and detached sections, such as a covered porch, a small gazebo, and a garage or shed. The yard is landscaped with a variety of trees, shrubs, and flowering plants, and there are paved walkways and a driveway leading to the entrance. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large panes and others smaller, distributed across the facade. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with steps and columns, providing a welcoming focal point. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the darker roof and trim elements.
description: A single-story house with hip and gable roofs, landscaped yard, covered porch, and asymmetrical windows, set within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and landscaped garden leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the attached garage or shed, and the arrangement of trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional entry points, and a gazebo or small outbuilding near the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main roof structure, more garden features, and the overall layout of the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, columns, and a prominent main door
